use_cases: Photography portfolio showcasing with scroll-driven kinetic effects
Product gallery with dynamic skew animations based on scroll velocity
Creative agency landing pages with interactive image grids
Travel and lifestyle content presentation with physics-based scroll transforms
ai_summary: A kinetic scroll-driven image gallery that applies smooth skew transformations to images based on scroll velocity using Framer Motion's spring physics. Features a grid of images that dynamically respond to user scrolling with elastic, physics-based animations via useSpring and useTransform hooks.
